posts.title: Why Rest Days Are Not Lazy: The Science of Recovery
posts.excerpt: Most people think rest days mean you're falling behind. Science says otherwise. Understanding recovery is the difference between progressing and overtraining.

posts.title: The 5 AM Advantage: How to Build a Morning Routine for Peak Performance
posts.excerpt: Discover how to create a science-backed morning routine that boosts energy, focus, and productivity without burnout. Practical steps for high achievers who want sustainable success.

posts.title: Digital Boundaries: How to Use Technology Without Letting It Use You
posts.excerpt: Learn how to create mindful technology boundaries that protect your attention, reduce anxiety, and help you reclaim control over your digital life.

posts.title: Beyond the Hype: Building Sustainable Wellness Habits That Actually Stick
posts.excerpt: Stop chasing wellness trends and build habits that last. Learn the science of sustainable behavior change and create a wellness routine you can maintain for life.
